summary: Completed comprehensive testing of The Gig Pulse app conversion from Expo React Native to standard React. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend 95% functional with minor UX improvements needed.

ui_bugs.issue: Menu item selector mismatch - 'menu-item-top-gear-picks' not found, actual implementation uses different naming

integration_issues.issue: Form submits successfully but redirects to home page without clear success feedback

passed_tests: All static content endpoints (featured channels, weekly shows, featured gear, community favorites, gig apps, helpful tools)
Suggestion submission endpoints (channel, gear, app, news)
Home page load and navigation cards
Bottom tab navigation (Content, News, Essentials, Apps, Merch)
Admin panel tabs (Apps, Gear, Channels, News, Emails)
Featured content display on all pages
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UX improvements: 1) Fix menu item data-testid naming consistency, 2) Add clear success/error feedback for email subscription form on merch page (currently redirects without user confirmation)
